content: Step 1: Backend foundation — models, settings, player CRUD, match CRUD
Step 2: Backend live scoring — WebSocket, momentum engine, emotions
Step 3: Backend leagues — standings, rating calculations
Step 4: Frontend — Dashboard, Record Match, Rankings, League
Step 5: Frontend live scoring — Referee panel, Spectator, Overlay
Step 6: Frontend momentum graph + GIF emotions
Step 7: Remove old PinPanClub + add Sport to navigation
